message:
refactor(workspace): remove leftover wasm.rs from extracted frankenterm-web crate

This 7588-line file was the main WASM entry point for the
frankenterm-web crate, which was removed in e2bb961e ("remove
extracted frankenterm-core and frankenterm-web crates").  The
file itself was missed during that refactor and remained tracked
in the repository despite the crate directory being otherwise empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
